# F021 Cell-JEPA RNA Representation Warmstart

## Decision
`F021_CELLJEPA_WARMSTART_DISCARDED_NO_SAFE_REPRESENTATION_GAIN`

## Paper Consulted
`papers/2602.02093v1.pdf`

## User Amendment Applied
The user instructed that Cell-JEPA supports single-cell representation learning, but must not be treated as a promoted perturbation-transition solution because the paper reports absolute-state gains without effect-size/delta improvement. This branch therefore trains a representation warmstart, evaluates representation metrics first, then reruns the protected train-only action-ridge floor on frozen `z_bio`.

## Active Gates
- transition improvement >= `0.003221`
- delta cosine >= `0.394388`
- condition recall@1 >= `0.255644`

## Summary Metrics
- completed seeds: `5`
- representation_ok: `False`
- transition_preserved: `False`
- mean same-condition recall gain: `-0.066667`
- mean same-cell recall@1 under repeated masking/subsampling: `0.005556`
- mean dropout robustness cosine: `0.998687`
- mean JEPA/reconstruction weighted ratio: `29.608795`
- mean transition gap vs old floor: `-0.011257`
- min transition gap vs old floor: `-0.021734`
- mean recall gap vs old floor: `-0.103704`
- min recall gap vs old floor: `-0.185185`

## Interpretation
F021 is not eligible for promotion as a transition model. A residual/risk-gate search can reopen only if the new frozen `z_bio` preserves or improves transition improvement, recall@1, delta cosine, effective rank, and per-seed stability relative to the protected floor.
